name: io.github.codespar/mcp-z-api
description: WhatsApp messaging, contacts, groups, labels — Z-API

tools.name: send_text
tools.description: Send a text message via WhatsApp

tools.name: send_image
tools.description: Send an image message via WhatsApp

tools.name: send_document
tools.description: Send a document via WhatsApp

tools.name: send_audio
tools.description: Send an audio message via WhatsApp

tools.name: get_contacts
tools.description: Get all WhatsApp contacts

tools.name: check_number
tools.description: Check if a phone number has WhatsApp

tools.name: get_profile_picture
tools.description: Get profile picture URL for a phone number

tools.name: get_messages
tools.description: Get messages for a phone number

tools.name: send_button_list
tools.description: Send a button list message via WhatsApp

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get WhatsApp instance connection status

tools.name: create_group
tools.description: Create a WhatsApp group

tools.name: get_group_metadata
tools.description: Get group metadata and participants

tools.name: add_group_participant
tools.description: Add a participant to a WhatsApp group

tools.name: remove_group_participant
tools.description: Remove a participant from a WhatsApp group

tools.name: send_location
tools.description: Send a location message via WhatsApp

tools.name: send_contact
tools.description: Send a contact card via WhatsApp

tools.name: add_label
tools.description: Assign a label/tag to a chat

tools.name: get_labels
tools.description: List all available labels/tags

tools.name: read_message
tools.description: Mark messages as read

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Delete a message
